---
title: "Daisy Chain, or, Aspirations: A Family Chronicle, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.” 2 Vols"
---

## Daisy Chain, or, Aspirations: A Family Chronicle, The. By the author of “The Heir of Redclyffe.” 2 Vols

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1856
**Genre:** Fiction (modern)
**Format:** Book

**Publisher:** John W Parker and Son, West Strand, London.

### Notes

The May family appear again in <i>The Trial</i> and other novels.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
